Income Statement

Balance Sheet

Settings & Data

Manage your business data and preferences

💾 Data Management

Data is automatically synced to Supabase cloud storage. Export creates a local backup file.

ℹ️ About

Our Stationery Business Manager helps you track inventory, manage capital, record income and expenses, and generate financial statements. Data is securely stored in Supabase with real-time synchronization across devices.

💰 Edit Capital
💵 Edit Income Data

Add custom categories for your inventory items. Base categories cannot be removed.
